message:
feat: add Python and TOML syntax highlighting to demo editor

Expand the editor panel's syntax highlighting to support Python and
TOML in addition to Rust, Markdown, and Plain text.

Python highlighting:
- Comments (# but not #! shebang)
- Shebang lines (#!)
- Docstrings (triple quotes)
- Decorators (@)
- Keywords (def, class, if, else, for, while, import, etc.)
- Strings containing quotes

TOML highlighting:
- Comments (#)
- Section headers ([section]) - bold with accent
- Key = value lines

Language indicator:
- Header now shows [Python] and [TOML] for those file types

Sample content:
- Added EDITOR_SAMPLE_PYTHON demonstrating Python syntax
- Shows proper highlighting of all Python constructs

Snapshot updates reflect the new language support and tour
determinism improvements.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
